Service 03

Agentes Autónomos

Tu operación trabaja. Incluso cuando duermes.

We deploy autonomous AI agents to automate customer service, lead capture and operational management in real time. Continuous 24/7 operation that responds, filters and scales without friction — reducing operational load and expanding your response capacity without growing the human structure. Because at CallDom, the operation never goes dark.

Features

  • Continuous 24/7/365 operation with zero downtime
  • Advanced Natural Language Processing (NLP)
  • Native integration with WhatsApp, Signal, Telegram and WebChat
  • Automatic escalation to human agent for complex cases
  • Automatic contact capture, filtering and routing
  • Reduction of operational load on repetitive tasks

Benefits

  • Total Availability — Zero Downtime: Handles thousands of simultaneous conversations with no wait times, 365 days a year. Your operation never goes dark.
  • Scalability without Structure: Grow your service capacity without proportionally increasing your human team or operational costs.
  • Lower Cost per Interaction: Automates up to 80% of repetitive interactions — freeing your human team to focus exclusively on high-value moments.
  • Continuous AI Learning: Agents refine themselves with every conversation, expanding coverage and improving accuracy under CallDom's expert supervision.

What we do

We automate conversations and key tasks so your business responds at any time without depending on human availability or business hours. We implement agents that attend, filter, schedule and connect with your real processes — built on your actual operation, not generic scripts.

  • We Automate Service Without Losing the Human Feel
  • We Design Flows That Understand Context
  • We Integrate AI with Your Channels and Systems
  • We Combine Automation and Human Talent

Frequently Asked Questions

How autonomous is the agent really?

It executes complete flows: respond, qualify, schedule, notify and record — without human intervention. It escalates only when it detects situations that require human judgment or empathy.

Can it escalate to a human agent?

Yes. It automatically detects critical or complex conversations and transfers them with full context to a human agent — so nothing falls through the cracks.

How long does deployment take?

Between 1 and 3 weeks depending on flow complexity and required integrations. We move fast without cutting corners.

Do the agents learn over time?

Yes. With every conversation the model refines itself. The CallDom team also performs periodic reviews to improve accuracy, coverage and Caribbean-caliber quality.

Does it integrate with my current systems (CRM, ERP, etc.)?

Yes. Our agents connect with your existing systems — CRM, APIs, databases — to query, record and execute actions in real time.

What types of processes can it automate?

From frequent responses to complete flows like lead qualification, scheduling, follow-up, request management and basic technical support.

How is agent performance measured?

Through real-time dashboards: conversation volume, resolution rate, response times, conversions and more. If it's not measured, it doesn't exist.

How much does implementing autonomous agents cost?

It depends on scope, volume and integration level. The model is designed to reduce operational costs and generate measurable returns from the earliest stages.

Unified service foundation

  • True Omnichannel: Calls, WhatsApp, Instagram, chat, email and CRM unified in one fluid operation. No disconnected channels, no lost context, no friction.
  • AI-Powered Automation: Autonomous agents and intelligent flows that optimize every process, scale without limits, and free your human team to do what only humans can do.
  • Real-Time Executive Dashboard: Full operational visibility with Looker Studio and Power BI — every metric, every SLA, every decision grounded in data.
